top_findings.summary: The skill requests unrestricted Bash command execution (`Bash(cmd:*)`) which is excessive for its stated purpose of "generating test suites." While some limited command execution might be needed for test automation, full unrestricted Bash access on the system (including ability to install packages, modify system files, or access any data) goes far beyond what's necessary for analyzing code and generating test files. The skill could operate safely with read/write permissions only to the project directory and specific testing commands, rather than arbitrary system-level command execution.
